'''Darryn Edalm''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|human]] who served as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucrat]]. He was wiry, paranoid, and compulsive, and he tried to fit into the image of an Imperial [[Governor/Legends|governor]].

Originally an Imperial researcher, he discovered a survey which indicated the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Karra]] had a large amount of valuable [[Varmigio|resources]]. When this proved to be false, he was accused of [[Treason/Legends|treason]] and stripped of all authority. He was arrested and put on a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] to be transferred off-planet for trial and execution. The shuttle crashed and he was rescued by a group of Rebels led by [[Elth Nardah]]. When Nardah agreed to take him as a prisoner, the [[Karran]] became angry that the Imperial wasn't being killed and attacked the Rebels and their prisoner. After defeating the natives, Edalm balked at returning to the [[Karran village]] to retrieve the Rebel's [[Starship/Legends|ship]] and suggested they instead steal a confiscated [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] ship from the local Imperial base. Upon discovering the Rebel ship was disabled by the Karran, he accompanied the Rebels to the local Imperial base. During the trip, he became annoyed at [[Karvinna Raen]] who had a hard time dealing with the death of Nardah. After escaping Karra, Edalm traveled with the group to the Alliance base [[Seven Flames]]. He was questioned by agents of [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] and, due to his relative unimportance, was sentenced to spend the rest of the war working at a medium-security work camp on [[Shimmer]].
